nodes.name: ⏰ Check for Products to Publish (Every 4h)
nodes.notes: Checks every 4 hours for products ready to publish. Runs after Workflow 2 populates Products_Ready.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Products Ready to Publish
nodes.notes: Reads products with Status='Ready to Publish' that haven't been published yet.

nodes.name: 🛒 Publish to Gumroad
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Replace YOUR_GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN with your token from gumroad.com/settings/advanced. Creates a new product listing. Price is in cents.

nodes.name: 🛒 Publish to Etsy
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Etsy API requires OAuth2 setup. Replace YOUR_SHOP_ID, YOUR_ETSY_API_KEY, YOUR_ETSY_OAUTH_TOKEN. Create app at etsy.com/developers. taxonomy_id 2078 = Digital Downloads.

nodes.name: 🛒 Publish to Payhip
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Get API key from payhip.com/account/api. Payhip is FREE with 5% transaction fee - great for beginners. No monthly cost.

nodes.name: 📦 Collect Publishing Results
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all 3 store APIs. Extracts product URLs for social media posts.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Sheet — Published Status
nodes.notes: Updates the Products_Ready sheet with publish status and store URLs.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Published_Products Tab
nodes.notes: Creates a permanent record in the Published_Products tracking tab.

nodes.name: 🚀 Trigger Social Media Workflow
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Replace YOUR_N8N_WEBHOOK_URL_FOR_WORKFLOW_4 with the webhook URL from Workflow 4. This hands off to the social promotion agent.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Prep WooCommerce Payload
nodes.notes: Prepares the WooCommerce product payload. WooCommerce publishing is DISABLED by default (wc_enabled = false). To activate Phase 2: change wcEnabledGlobal to true AND ensure WC credentials are set in WF06.

nodes.name: 🔀 WooCommerce Enabled?
nodes.notes: Gate node — only proceeds to WC publish if enabled. When disabled, product data is still prepared and logged, ready for when you flip the switch.

nodes.name: 🛒 Publish to WooCommerce
nodes.notes: SETUP (Phase 2): (1) Install WooCommerce plugin on WordPress. (2) WP Admin → WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API → Add Key (Read/Write). (3) Base64 encode 'consumer_key:consumer_secret'. (4) Replace YOUR_WC_BASE64_CREDENTIALS. (5) Set wcEnabledGlobal = true in Prep node.

nodes.name: ⏭️ WC Skipped (Phase 2)
nodes.notes: Runs when WooCommerce is disabled. Saves the prepared payload to the log so you can review it before Phase 2 activation.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Sheet — WC Status
nodes.notes: Updates Published_Products sheet with WooCommerce status. PHASE_2_PENDING = ready to publish once enabled. PUBLISHED = live on WooCommerce.

meta.description: Phase 3: Publishing agent. Publishes to Gumroad, Etsy, and Payhip simultaneously. Updates Google Sheets with store URLs and triggers social media workflow.
